Title: IWS - Verify LED ring color control available
Preconditions: 1. Open "Q-SYS Designer" software.

Title: 2. Create a new design.
3. Add an IWS component to the canvas.
4. IWS device is commissioned and connected on the network.
Preconditions: 1. Double-click the IWS component to open Floating Window "Intelligent Workspace Sensor".

Title: 2. Select the "LED Configuration" tab.
3. Locate the LED ring color control.
Preconditions: 1. LED ring color control is visible on the LED Configuration tab.

Title: 2. Color selection options are available (e.g., color picker, RGB values, or preset colors).
Preconditions: Manual

Title: IWS - Set LED ring to a specific color
Preconditions: 1. Open "Q-SYS Designer" software.

Title: 2. Create a new design.
3. Add an IWS component to the canvas.
4. IWS device is commissioned and connected on the network.
Preconditions: 1. Double-click the IWS component to open Floating Window "Intelligent Workspace Sensor".

Title: 2. Select the "LED Configuration" tab.
3. Locate the LED Color control.
4. Set the LED color to red (R:255, G:0, B:0 or equivalent).
4. Observe the physical IWS device.
Preconditions: 1. The LED ring color value updates to red in the UI.

Title: 2. The physical IWS device LED ring illuminates red.
Preconditions: Manual

Title: IWS - Set LED ring brightness to maximum
Preconditions: 1. Open "Q-SYS Designer" software.

Title: 2. Create a new design.
3. Add an IWS component to the canvas.
4. IWS device is commissioned and connected on the network.
Preconditions: 1. Double-click the IWS component to open Floating Window "Intelligent Workspace Sensor".

Title: 2. Select the "LED Configuration" tab.
3. Locate the LED Brightness control.
4. Set brightness to maximum (100%).
Preconditions: 1. The brightness value shows 100% in the UI.

Title: 2. The physical IWS device LED ring is at maximum brightness.
Preconditions: Manual

Title: IWS - Set LED ring brightness to minimum
Preconditions: 1. Open "Q-SYS Designer" software.

Title: 2. Create a new design.
3. Add an IWS component to the canvas.
4. IWS device is commissioned and connected on the network.
Preconditions: 1. Double-click the IWS component to open Floating Window "Intelligent Workspace Sensor".

Title: 2. Select the "LED Configuration" tab.
3. Locate the LED Brightness control.
4. Set brightness to minimum (0%).
Preconditions: 1. The brightness value shows 0% in the UI.

Title: 2. The physical IWS device LED ring is off or at minimum brightness.
Preconditions: Manual

Title: IWS - Set LED ring brightness to midrange value
Preconditions: 1. Open "Q-SYS Designer" software.

Title: 2. Create a new design.
3. Add an IWS component to the canvas.
4. IWS device is commissioned and connected on the network.
Preconditions: 1. Double-click the IWS component to open Floating Window "Intelligent Workspace Sensor".

Title: 2. Select the "LED Configuration" tab.
3. Locate the LED Brightness control.
4. Set brightness to 50%.
5. Observe the physical IWS device.
Preconditions: 1. The brightness value shows 50% in the UI.

Title: 2. The physical IWS device LED ring brightness is noticeably dimmer than maximum but still illuminated.
Preconditions: Manual

Title: IWS - Turn LED ring off
Preconditions: 1. Open "Q-SYS Designer" software.

Title: 2. Create a new design.
3. Add an IWS component to the canvas.
4. IWS device is commissioned and connected on the network.
5. The LED ring is currently illuminated.
Preconditions: 1. Double-click the IWS component to open Floating Window "Intelligent Workspace Sensor".

Title: 2. Select the "LED Configuration" tab.
3. Locate the LED Enable control.
4. Turn the LED ring off.
Preconditions: 1. The LED status in the UI shows off/disabled.

Title: 2. The physical IWS device LED ring turns off completely.
Preconditions: Manual

Title: IWS - Turn LED ring on after being off
Preconditions: 1. Open "Q-SYS Designer" software.

Title: 2. Create a new design.
3. Add an IWS component to the canvas.
4. IWS device is commissioned and connected on the network.
5. The LED ring is currently off.
Preconditions: 1. Double-click the IWS component to open Floating Window "Intelligent Workspace Sensor".

Title: 2. Select the "LED Configuration" tab.
3. Locate the LED Enable control.
4. Turn the LED ring on.
Preconditions: 1. The LED status in the UI shows on/enabled.

Title: 2. The physical IWS device LED ring illuminates with the previously configured color and brightness.
Preconditions: Manual

Title: IWS - Cycle through multiple LED colors
Preconditions: 1. Open "Q-SYS Designer" software.

Title: 2. Create a new design.
3. Add an IWS component to the canvas.
4. IWS device is commissioned and connected on the network.
Preconditions: 1. Double-click the IWS component to open Floating Window "Intelligent Workspace Sensor".

Title: 2. Select the "LED Configuration" tab.
3. Set the LED color to red and observe.
3. Change the LED color to green and observe.
4. Change the LED color to blue and observe.
5. Change the LED color to white and observe.
Preconditions: 1. Each color change is reflected in the UI immediately.

Title: 2. The physical IWS device LED ring changes color to match each selection.
3. No color bleed or artifacts from previous colors remain.
Preconditions: Manual

Title: IWS - Verify LED control with device disconnected
Preconditions: 1. Open "Q-SYS Designer" software.

Title: 2. Create a new design.
3. Add an IWS component to the canvas.
4. IWS device was previously commissioned, then disconnected from network.
Preconditions: 1. Double-click the IWS component to open Floating Window "Intelligent Workspace Sensor".

Title: 2. Select the "LED Configuration" tab.
3. Attempt to change the LED ring color.
3. Attempt to change the LED ring brightness.
Preconditions: 1. The UI allows modifying the LED values.

Title: 2. The component status indicates the device is disconnected.
3. No crash or unhandled error occurs when sending LED commands to a disconnected device.
Preconditions: Manual

Title: IWS - Verify LED settings via control pins
Preconditions: 1. Open "Q-SYS Designer" software.

Title: 2. Create a new design.
3. Add an IWS component to the canvas.
4. IWS device is commissioned and connected on the network.
Preconditions: 1. Select the IWS component on Center Workspace > Canvas.

Title: 2. Verify LED-related control pins are exposed: "LED Color", "LED Brightness", "LED Enable", "LED Pattern", "LED Speed".
3. Connect a script or control component to the LED control pins.
4. Send values via the control pins to change color, brightness, pattern, and speed.
Preconditions: 1. All five LED-related control pins are available and exposed on the component.

Title: 2. Sending values via control pins changes the LED ring on the physical device.
3. The Floating Window "Intelligent Workspace Sensor" > LED Configuration tab reflects the updated LED values.
Preconditions: Manual

Title: IWS - Verify LED Pattern control
Preconditions: 1. Open "Q-SYS Designer" software.

Title: 2. Create a new design.
3. Add an IWS component to the canvas.
4. IWS device is commissioned and connected on the network.
Preconditions: 1. Double-click the IWS component to open Floating Window "Intelligent Workspace Sensor".

Title: 2. Select the "LED Configuration" tab.
3. Locate the LED Pattern control.
3. Cycle through available LED patterns.
4. Observe the physical IWS device for each pattern.
Preconditions: 1. Multiple LED patterns are available for selection.

Title: 2. Each pattern produces a visually distinct effect on the physical LED ring (e.g., solid, pulse, chase, breathe).
3. The selected pattern is reflected in the UI.
Preconditions: Manual

Title: IWS - Verify LED Speed control
Preconditions: 1. Open "Q-SYS Designer" software.

Title: 2. Create a new design.
3. Add an IWS component to the canvas.
4. IWS device is commissioned and connected on the network.
5. LED Pattern is set to an animated pattern (not solid).
Preconditions: 1. Double-click the IWS component to open Floating Window "Intelligent Workspace Sensor".

Title: 2. Select the "LED Configuration" tab.
3. Locate the LED Speed control.
3. Set the speed to a low value and observe the LED animation.
4. Set the speed to a high value and observe the LED animation.
Preconditions: 1. The LED animation speed on the physical device changes with each setting.

Title: 2. The speed change is visually noticeable.
3. The speed value is reflected in the UI.
Preconditions: Manual
